revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-210

Internal Absorptance (of a homogeneous non-diffusing plate)

The ratio of the luminous flux absorbed between the entry and exit surfaces of the plate, to the flux which leaves the entry surface.

Symbol: ai ai + Ti = 1

Reference: C.I.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
